SUBJECT: Affiliate: important new "shennanigans"

NAME,

Sorry about that headline - I've been reading too much of Frank Kern's stuff lately.

But this is what really matters - we just released a MAJOR new component of SMARTS which makes the offer even better than it was.

The current offer and sales letter are
converting at 4%... an amazing number for a $1500 product.

But we want to make the offer even better, and we want to give you a great new reason to promote.

So we added in SMARTS "Instant Grad School"...
this is something we had planned as a $497.00 upsell, but we decided to throw it in to make the offer even more powerful.

More commissions for you... and, of course, more sales for us. AND, just as important, more happy clients - because everyone who already bought gets this bonus as well.

Mail on this now, it's going to drive
commissions through the roof. I've included fresh swipe copy below... and here's your affiliate link:

http:// aff link


best regards,
Jeff Walker

P.S. we will send affiliate standings later today. I just wanted to get this out to you asap.

SUBJECT: SMARTS just got even better...


NAME,

You probably heard about the StomperNet SMARTS - the new social marketing traffic program that teaches how to drive mass traffic through the web 2.0 sites like Facebook, YouTube, and MySpace...

Well this already looked like a great program, but it just got even better...

You see, StomperNet has this "upsell" strategy planned... they planned to sell a $497.00 follow up course they called their SMARTS "Instant Grad School" - a place where they would teach some really advanced super-ninja stuff (with an emphasis on rapid implementation).

best regards,
